from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def reconcile_meter_readings(billing_period, smart_meters, billing_records):
    mismatches = (
        smart_meters.alias("m")
        .join(billing_records.alias("b"), "meter_id", "inner")
        .filter(
            (F.col("b.billing_period") == billing_period) &
            (F.col("m.last_reading") != F.col("b.billed_units"))
        )
        .select(
            F.col("m.meter_id"), F.col("m.customer_id"),
            F.col("m.last_reading"), F.col("b.billed_units")
        )
    )

    summary = mismatches.agg(
        F.count("meter_id").alias("meters_reconciled"),
        F.sum(F.abs(F.col("last_reading") - F.col("billed_units"))).alias("total_unit_variance")
    ).withColumn("billing_period", F.lit(billing_period)).withColumn("run_at", F.lit(now))

    corrected = (
        billing_records.alias("b")
        .join(
            mismatches.select("meter_id", "last_reading"),
            "meter_id", "left"
        )
        .withColumn("billed_units",
            F.coalesce(F.col("last_reading"), F.col("billed_units")))
        .withColumn("reconciled",
            F.when(F.col("last_reading").isNotNull(), "Y").otherwise(F.col("reconciled")))
        .withColumn("reconciled_at",
            F.when(F.col("last_reading").isNotNull(), F.lit(now)).otherwise(F.col("reconciled_at")))
        .drop("last_reading")
    )

    corrected.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("billing_records")
    summary.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("reconciliation_summary")

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()
portfolio_id = 2045

active_holdings = portfolio_holdings.filter(
    (F.col("portfolio_id") == portfolio_id) & (F.col("active_flag") == "Y")
)

if active_holdings.limit(1).count() == 0:
    print(f"No active holdings for portfolio: {portfolio_id}")
else:
    nav_summary = active_holdings.agg(
        F.sum("market_value").alias("total_nav"),
        F.count("asset_id").alias("asset_count")
    ).collect()[0]

    updated_holdings = portfolio_holdings.withColumn(
        "last_valued_at",
        F.when(
            (F.col("portfolio_id") == portfolio_id) & (F.col("active_flag") == "Y"),
            F.lit(now)
        ).otherwise(F.col("last_valued_at"))
    )

    updated_summary = portfolio_summary.withColumn(
        "total_nav",
        F.when(F.col("portfolio_id") == portfolio_id, F.lit(nav_summary["total_nav"]))
         .otherwise(F.col("total_nav"))
    ).withColumn(
        "asset_count",
        F.when(F.col("portfolio_id") == portfolio_id, F.lit(nav_summary["asset_count"]))
         .otherwise(F.col("asset_count"))
    ).withColumn(
        "last_refreshed",
        F.when(F.col("portfolio_id") == portfolio_id, F.lit(now))
         .otherwise(F.col("last_refreshed"))
    )

    updated_holdings.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("portfolio_holdings")
    updated_summary.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("portfolio_summary")

)

    [("bulk_expire", expired_count, now)],
    ["event_type", "affected_count", "event_time"]

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

segments = loyalty_segments.orderBy("min_spend")

resegmented = (
    loyalty_members
    .join(
        segments.select("segment_id", "min_spend", "max_spend"),
        (F.col("annual_spend") >= F.col("min_spend")) &
        (F.col("annual_spend") <= F.col("max_spend")),
        "left"
    )
    .withColumnRenamed("segment_id", "new_segment_id")
    .withColumn("segment_id",
        F.when(F.col("annual_spend").isNull(), F.lit(None))
         .when(F.col("new_segment_id").isNotNull(), F.col("new_segment_id"))
         .otherwise(F.col("segment_id"))
    )
    .withColumn("segment_updated_at",
        F.when(
            F.col("new_segment_id").isNotNull() | F.col("annual_spend").isNull(),
            F.lit(now)
        ).otherwise(F.col("segment_updated_at"))
    )
    .drop("new_segment_id", "min_spend", "max_spend")
)

v_updated = resegmented.filter(
    F.col("segment_updated_at") == F.lit(now)
).count()

print(f"Total members re-segmented: {v_updated}")
resegmented.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("loyalty_members")

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def generate_invoice_snapshots(p_snapshot_date, invoices, invoice_payments,
                                invoice_snapshot_batches, spark):
    max_batch = invoice_snapshot_batches.agg(F.max("batch_id")).collect()[0][0]
    v_batch_id = (max_batch or 0) + 1

    new_batch = spark.createDataFrame(
        [(v_batch_id, p_snapshot_date, now)],
        ["batch_id", "snapshot_date", "created_at"]
    )
    new_batch.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("invoice_snapshot_batches")

    snapshots = (
        invoices.alias("i")
        .join(invoice_payments.alias("p"), "invoice_id", "left")
        .filter(
            (F.col("i.invoice_date") <= F.lit(p_snapshot_date)) &
            (F.col("i.invoice_status").isin("open", "partial"))
        )
        .withColumn("paid", F.coalesce(F.col("p.payment_amount"), F.lit(0)))
        .withColumn("outstanding", F.col("amount_due") - F.col("paid"))
        .withColumn("batch_id", F.lit(v_batch_id))

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def rebalance_ad_budgets(campaign_group_id, ad_campaigns):
    active_ads = ad_campaigns.filter(
        (F.col("campaign_group_id") == campaign_group_id) &
        (F.col("ad_status") == "active")
    )

    agg = active_ads.agg(
        F.sum("current_budget").alias("total_budget"),
        F.sum("current_spend").alias("total_spend"),
        F.count("ad_id").alias("ad_count")
    ).collect()[0]

    total_budget = agg["total_budget"]
    total_spend  = agg["total_spend"]
    ad_count     = agg["ad_count"]

    remaining  = total_budget - total_spend
    allocation = round(remaining / ad_count, 2) if ad_count else 0

    rebalanced = ad_campaigns.withColumn(
        "current_budget",
        F.when(
            (F.col("campaign_group_id") == campaign_group_id) & (F.col("ad_status") == "active"),
            F.col("current_spend") + F.lit(allocation)
        ).otherwise(F.col("current_budget"))
    ).withColumn(
        "rebalanced_at",
        F.when(
            (F.col("campaign_group_id") == campaign_group_id) & (F.col("ad_status") == "active"),
            F.lit(now)
        ).otherwise(F.col("rebalanced_at"))
    )

    rebalanced.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("ad_campaigns")

rebalance_ad_budgets(p_campaign_group_id, ad_campaigns)

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime, date

now = datetime.now()
today = date.today().isoformat()

max_run = eod_cash_run_log.agg(F.max("run_id")).collect()[0][0]
v_run_id = (max_run or 0) + 1

flows = (
    cash_flows
    .filter(F.col("value_date") == today)
    .groupBy("account_id", "flow_type")
    .agg(F.sum("amount").alias("flow_total"))
)

totals = flows.agg(
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("flow_type") == "inflow", F.col("flow_total")).otherwise(0)).alias("total_in"),
    F.sum(F.when(F.col("flow_type") == "outflow", F.col("flow_total")).otherwise(0)).alias("total_out")
).collect()[0]

v_total_in  = totals["total_in"]
v_total_out = totals["total_out"]
v_net       = v_total_in - v_total_out

net_by_account = (
    flows
    .withColumn(
        "net_delta",
        F.when(F.col("flow_type") == "inflow",  F.col("flow_total"))
         .when(F.col("flow_type") == "outflow", -F.col("flow_total"))
         .otherwise(0)
    )
    .groupBy("account_id")
    .agg(F.sum("net_delta").alias("net_delta"))
)

updated_balances = (
    account_balances
    .join(net_by_account, "account_id", "left")
    .withColumn("balance", F.col("balance") + F.coalesce(F.col("net_delta"), F.lit(0)))
    .withColumn("last_updated", F.when(F.col("net_delta").isNotNull(), F.lit(now)).otherwise(F.col("last_updated")))
    .drop("net_delta")
)

run_log_entry = spark.createDataFrame(
    [(v_run_id, today, v_total_in, v_total_out, v_net, now)],
    ["run_id", "run_date", "total_inflow", "total_outflow", "net_position", "logged_at"]
)

updated_balances.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("account_balances")
run_log_entry.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("eod_cash_run_log")

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE flag_inactive_devices(
  p_days_inactive NUMBER
) AS
BEGIN
  UPDATE iot_devices
  SET device_status = 'inactive',
      flagged_at    = SYSDATE
  WHERE last_ping_time < SYSDATE - p_days_inactive
  AND device_status   = 'active';

  INSERT INTO device_status_log
    (device_id, old_status, new_status, changed_at)
  SELECT device_id, 'active', 'inactive', SYSDATE
  FROM iot_devices
  WHERE device_status = 'inactive'
  AND flagged_at     >= TRUNC(SYSDATE);

  COMMIT;
END;
pyspark_code:
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

now = datetime.now()

def flag_inactive_devices(p_days_inactive, iot_devices, device_status_log, spark):
    cutoff = now - timedelta(days=p_days_inactive)
    today = now.date().isoformat()

    updated_devices = iot_devices.withColumn(
        "device_status",
        F.when(
            (F.col("last_ping_time") < F.lit(cutoff)) & (F.col("device_status") == "active"),
            F.lit("inactive")
        ).otherwise(F.col("device_status"))
    ).withColumn(
        "flagged_at",
        F.when(
            (F.col("last_ping_time") < F.lit(cutoff)) & (F.col("device_status") == "active"),
            F.lit(now)
        ).otherwise(F.col("flagged_at"))
    )

    updated_devices.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("iot_devices")

    newly_flagged = updated_devices.filter(
        (F.col("device_status") == "inactive") &
        (F.col("flagged_at") >= F.lit(today))
    ).select(
        "device_id",
        F.lit("active").alias("old_status"),
        F.lit("inactive").alias("new_status"),
        F.lit(now).alias("changed_at")
    )

    newly_flagged.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("device_status_log")

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE sync_product_prices(
  p_supplier_id NUMBER
) AS
  v_updated NUMBER := 0;
BEGIN
  MERGE INTO product_catalog pc
  USING (
    SELECT product_code, unit_price, effective_date
    FROM supplier_price_feeds
    WHERE supplier_id = p_supplier_id
    AND feed_date     = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
  ) spf
  ON (pc.product_code = spf.product_code)
  WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET pc.unit_price     = spf.unit_price,
               pc.last_updated  = SYSDATE
  WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (product_code, unit_price, supplier_id, created_at)
    VALUES (spf.product_code, spf.unit_price, p_supplier_id, SYSDATE);
  COMMIT;
END;
pyspark_code:
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()
today = now.date().isoformat()

def sync_product_prices(p_supplier_id, product_catalog, supplier_price_feeds, spark):
    feed = (
        supplier_price_feeds
        .filter(
            (F.col("supplier_id") == p_supplier_id) &
            (F.col("feed_date") == today)
        )
        .select("product_code", "unit_price", "effective_date")
    )

    matched = (
        product_catalog.alias("pc")
        .join(feed.alias("spf"), "product_code", "inner")
        .withColumn("unit_price", F.col("spf.unit_price"))
        .withColumn("last_updated", F.lit(now))
        .select("pc.*", F.col("spf.unit_price").alias("unit_price_new"), F.lit(now).alias("last_updated_new"))
    )

    updated_catalog = (
        product_catalog
        .join(feed.select("product_code", F.col("unit_price").alias("new_price")), "product_code", "left")
        .withColumn("unit_price", F.coalesce(F.col("new_price"), F.col("unit_price")))
        .withColumn("last_updated", F.when(F.col("new_price").isNotNull(), F.lit(now)).otherwise(F.col("last_updated")))
        .drop("new_price")
    )

    not_matched = (
        feed
        .join(product_catalog.select("product_code"), "product_code", "left_anti")
        .withColumn("supplier_id", F.lit(p_supplier_id))
        .withColumn("created_at", F.lit(now))
        .select("product_code", "unit_price", "supplier_id", "created_at")
    )

    final_catalog = updated_catalog.unionByName(not_matched, allowMissingColumns=True)
    final_catalog.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("product_catalog")

CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE reset_trial_accounts(
  p_trial_days NUMBER
) AS
  v_cutoff DATE := TRUNC(SYSDATE) - p_trial_days;
BEGIN
  UPDATE subscription_accounts
  SET account_status = 'expired',
      expired_at     = SYSDATE,
      access_level   = 'none'
  WHERE account_type  = 'trial'
  AND created_date   <= v_cutoff
  AND account_status  = 'active';

  INSERT INTO subscription_status_history
    (account_id, prev_status, new_status, changed_at)
  SELECT account_id, 'active', 'expired', SYSDATE
  FROM subscription_accounts
  WHERE account_type  = 'trial'
  AND expired_at     >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
  AND account_status  = 'expired';
  COMMIT;
END;
pyspark_code:
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

now = datetime.now()

def reset_trial_accounts(p_trial_days, subscription_accounts, subscription_status_history, spark):
    cutoff = (datetime.now() - timedelta(days=p_trial_days)).date().isoformat()
    today = now.date().isoformat()

    updated_accounts = subscription_accounts.withColumn(
        "account_status",
        F.when(
            (F.col("account_type") == "trial") &
            (F.col("created_date") <= cutoff) &
            (F.col("account_status") == "active"),
            F.lit("expired")
        ).otherwise(F.col("account_status"))
    ).withColumn(
        "expired_at",
        F.when(
            (F.col("account_type") == "trial") &
            (F.col("created_date") <= cutoff) &
            (F.col("account_status") == "active"),
            F.lit(now)
        ).otherwise(F.col("expired_at"))
    ).withColumn(
        "access_level",
        F.when(
            (F.col("account_type") == "trial") &
            (F.col("created_date") <= cutoff) &
            (F.col("account_status") == "active"),
            F.lit("none")
        ).otherwise(F.col("access_level"))
    )

    updated_accounts.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("subscription_accounts")

    history_rows = updated_accounts.filter(
        (F.col("account_type") == "trial") &
        (F.col("expired_at") >= today) &
        (F.col("account_status") == "expired")
    ).select(
        "account_id",
        F.lit("active").alias("prev_status"),
        F.lit("expired").alias("new_status"),
        F.lit(now).alias("changed_at")
    )

    history_rows.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("subscription_status_history")

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def rebalance_fund_portfolios(p_fund_family_id, p_rebalance_date,
                               mutual_funds, fund_holdings, fund_nav,
                               rebalance_batches, rebalance_orders, spark):
    max_batch = rebalance_batches.agg(F.max("batch_id")).collect()[0][0]
    v_batch_id = (max_batch or 0) + 1
    drift_threshold = 0.05

    new_batch = spark.createDataFrame(
        [(v_batch_id, p_fund_family_id, p_rebalance_date, "running", None, None, None)],
        ["batch_id", "fund_family_id", "run_date", "status", "completed_at", "error_msg", "dummy"]
    ).drop("dummy")
    new_batch.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("rebalance_batches")

    try:
        active_funds = mutual_funds.filter(
            (F.col("fund_family_id") == p_fund_family_id) & (F.col("active") == "Y")
        ).select("fund_id", "fund_name", "target_allocation")

        nav_on_date = fund_nav.filter(F.col("nav_date") == p_rebalance_date)

        holdings_with_weight = (
            fund_holdings.alias("h")
            .join(nav_on_date.alias("f"), "fund_id", "inner")
            .withColumn("weight", F.col("h.current_value") / F.when(F.col("f.nav") == 0, None).otherwise(F.col("f.nav")))
            .select("h.fund_id", "h.asset_id", "h.asset_class", "h.current_value", "weight")
        )

        joined = (
            holdings_with_weight.alias("hw")
            .join(active_funds.alias("af"), "fund_id", "inner")
            .withColumn("drift", F.abs(F.col("weight") - F.col("target_allocation")))
        )

        orders = (
            joined
            .filter(F.col("drift") > drift_threshold)
            .withColumn(
                "order_type",
                F.when(F.col("weight") > F.col("target_allocation"), "sell").otherwise("buy")
            )
            .withColumn("batch_id", F.lit(v_batch_id))
            .withColumn("current_weight", F.col("weight"))
            .withColumn("target_weight", F.col("target_allocation"))
            .withColumn("created_at", F.lit(now))
            .select("batch_id", "fund_id", "asset_id", "asset_class",
                    "current_weight", "target_weight", "drift", "order_type", "created_at")
        )

        orders.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("rebalance_orders")

        rebalance_batches.withColumn(
            "status", F.when(F.col("batch_id") == v_batch_id, "completed").otherwise(F.col("status"))
        ).withColumn(
            "completed_at", F.when(F.col("batch_id") == v_batch_id, F.lit(now)).otherwise(F.col("completed_at"))
        ).write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("rebalance_batches")

    except Exception as e:
        rebalance_batches.withColumn(
            "status", F.when(F.col("batch_id") == v_batch_id, "failed").otherwise(F.col("status"))
        ).withColumn(
            "error_msg", F.when(F.col("batch_id") == v_batch_id, F.lit(str(e))).otherwise(F.col("error_msg"))
        ).write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("rebalance_batches")
        raise

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def run_credit_scoring_batch(p_bureau_snapshot_date, loan_applications,
                              credit_bureau_data, credit_score_batch_log, spark):
    score_expr = (
        F.col("payment_history_score") * 0.35 +
        F.col("utilization_score")     * 0.30 +
        F.col("credit_age_score")      * 0.15 +
        F.col("mix_score")             * 0.10 +
        F.col("inquiry_score")         * 0.10
    )

    try:
        pending = loan_applications.filter(F.col("decision_status") == "pending")
        bureau  = credit_bureau_data.filter(F.col("snapshot_date") == p_bureau_snapshot_date)

        scored = (
            pending.alias("a")
            .join(bureau.alias("b"), "applicant_id", "inner")
            .withColumn("credit_score", score_expr)
            .withColumn(
                "credit_grade",
                F.when(score_expr >= 750, "A")
                 .when(score_expr >= 650, "B")
                 .when(score_expr >= 550, "C")
                 .otherwise("D")
            )
            .withColumn(
                "new_decision_status",
                F.when(score_expr >= 650, "approved")
                 .when(score_expr >= 550, "review")
                 .otherwise("declined")
            )
            .withColumn("scored_at", F.lit(now))
            .select("a.application_id", "credit_score", "credit_grade",
                    "new_decision_status", "scored_at")
        )

        v_succeeded = scored.count()

        updated = (
            loan_applications
            .join(scored, "application_id", "left")
            .withColumn("credit_score",
                F.coalesce(scored["credit_score"], loan_applications["credit_score"]))
            .withColumn("credit_grade",
                F.coalesce(scored["credit_grade"], loan_applications["credit_grade"]))
            .withColumn("decision_status",
                F.coalesce(F.col("new_decision_status"), loan_applications["decision_status"]))
            .withColumn("scored_at",
                F.coalesce(scored["scored_at"], loan_applications["scored_at"]))
            .drop("new_decision_status")
        )

        updated.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("loan_applications")

        log = spark.createDataFrame(
            [(p_bureau_snapshot_date, v_succeeded, 0, now)],
            ["snapshot_date", "total_scored", "failed_count", "run_at"]
        )
        log.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("credit_score_batch_log")

    except Exception as e:
        log = spark.createDataFrame(
            [(p_bureau_snapshot_date, 0, -1, now)],
            ["snapshot_date", "total_scored", "failed_count", "run_at"]
        )
        log.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("credit_score_batch_log")
        raise

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def process_insurance_claims_batch(p_batch_date, insurance_claims,
                                    policy_coverage, claims_batch_manifest, spark):
    claim_types = (
        insurance_claims
        .filter(
            (F.col("submission_date") == p_batch_date) &
            (F.col("processing_status") == "new")
        )
        .select("claim_type")
        .distinct()
        .collect()
    )

    manifest_rows = []

    for row in claim_types:
        claim_type = row["claim_type"]
        tbl_suffix = claim_type.lower().replace(" ", "_")
        table_name = f"claims_staging_{tbl_suffix}"

        staging_df = (
            insurance_claims.alias("c")
            .join(policy_coverage.alias("p"), "policy_id", "inner")
            .filter(
                (F.col("c.claim_type") == claim_type) &
                (F.col("c.submission_date") == p_batch_date)
            )
            .select("c.*", "p.coverage_limit", "p.deductible")
        )

        staging_df.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable(table_name)
        v_cnt = staging_df.count()
        manifest_rows.append((p_batch_date, claim_type, table_name, v_cnt, now))

    if manifest_rows:
        manifest_df = spark.createDataFrame(
            manifest_rows,
            ["batch_date", "claim_type", "staging_table", "record_count", "created_at"]
        )
        manifest_df.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("claims_batch_manifest")

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def settle_interbank_positions(p_settlement_date, interbank_transactions,
                                registered_banks, settlement_runs,
                                settlement_entries, bank_settlement_accounts, spark):
    max_id = settlement_runs.agg(F.max("settlement_id")).collect()[0][0]
    v_settlement_id = (max_id or 0) + 1

    positions = (
        interbank_transactions.alias("t")
        .join(registered_banks.alias("b"), "bank_id", "inner")
        .filter(
            (F.col("t.settlement_date") == p_settlement_date) &
            (F.col("t.settled") == "N")
        )
        .groupBy("b.bank_id")
        .agg(
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("direction") == "send", F.col("amount")).otherwise(0)).alias("gross_send"),
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("direction") == "receive", F.col("amount")).otherwise(0)).alias("gross_receive"),
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("direction") == "send", -F.col("amount")).otherwise(F.col("amount"))).alias("net_position")
        )
    )

    bank_count = positions.count()
    run_row = spark.createDataFrame(
        [(v_settlement_id, p_settlement_date, bank_count, now)],
        ["settlement_id", "settlement_date", "bank_count", "initiated_at"]
    )
    run_row.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("settlement_runs")

    entries = (
        positions
        .withColumn("settlement_id", F.lit(v_settlement_id))
        .withColumn("entry_date", F.lit(p_settlement_date))
        .select("settlement_id", "bank_id", "gross_send", "gross_receive", "net_position", "entry_date")
    )
    entries.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("settlement_entries")

    updated_accounts = (
        bank_settlement_accounts
        .join(positions.select("bank_id", "net_position"), "bank_id", "left")
        .withColumn("current_balance",
            F.col("current_balance") + F.coalesce(F.col("net_position"), F.lit(0)))
        .withColumn("last_settled",
            F.when(F.col("net_position").isNotNull(), F.lit(p_settlement_date))
             .otherwise(F.col("last_settled")))
        .drop("net_position")
    )
    updated_accounts.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("bank_settlement_accounts")

    settled_txns = interbank_transactions.withColumn(
        "settled", F.when(
            (F.col("settlement_date") == p_settlement_date) & (F.col("settled") == "N"), "Y"
        ).otherwise(F.col("settled"))
    ).withColumn(
        "settled_at", F.when(
            (F.col("settlement_date") == p_settlement_date) & (F.col("settled") == "N"), F.lit(now)
        ).otherwise(F.col("settled_at"))
    ).withColumn(
        "settlement_id", F.when(
            (F.col("settlement_date") == p_settlement_date) & (F.col("settled") == "N"), F.lit(v_settlement_id)
        ).otherwise(F.col("settlement_id"))
    )
    settled_txns.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("interbank_transactions")

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def recalculate_supply_chain_costs(p_vendor_id, p_cost_model,
                                    procurement_orders, supplier_charges,
                                    cost_model_weights, cost_recalc_audit, spark):
    valid_models = ["standard", "weighted", "marginal"]

    if p_cost_model not in valid_models:
        err_log = spark.createDataFrame(
            [(p_vendor_id, p_cost_model, 0, f"Invalid cost model: {p_cost_model}", now)],
            ["vendor_id", "cost_model", "records_updated", "error_msg", "run_at"]
        )
        err_log.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("cost_recalc_audit")
        raise ValueError(f"Invalid cost model: {p_cost_model}")

    if p_cost_model == "standard":
        v_multiplier = 1.0
    elif p_cost_model == "weighted":
        wt = cost_model_weights.filter(F.col("model_name") == "weighted") \
                               .agg(F.avg("weight_factor")).collect()[0][0]
        v_multiplier = wt or 1.0
    else:
        v_multiplier = 1.15

    try:
        to_recalc = (
            procurement_orders.alias("p")
            .join(supplier_charges.alias("s"),
                  F.col("p.supplier_charge_id") == F.col("s.charge_id"), "inner")
            .filter(
                (F.col("p.vendor_id") == p_vendor_id) &
                (F.col("p.cost_recalc_flag") == "Y") &
                (F.col("p.cost_model_applied") != p_cost_model)
            )
            .withColumn(
                "recalculated_cost",
                (F.col("p.unit_cost") +
                 F.coalesce(F.col("s.handling_fee"), F.lit(0)) +
                 F.coalesce(F.col("s.freight_cost"), F.lit(0))) * v_multiplier
            )
            .select("p.procurement_id", "recalculated_cost")
        )

        v_count = to_recalc.count()

        updated_orders = (
            procurement_orders
            .join(to_recalc, "procurement_id", "left")
            .withColumn("recalculated_cost",
                F.coalesce(to_recalc["recalculated_cost"], procurement_orders["recalculated_cost"]))
            .withColumn("cost_model_applied",
                F.when(to_recalc["procurement_id"].isNotNull(), F.lit(p_cost_model))
                 .otherwise(F.col("cost_model_applied")))
            .withColumn("recalc_timestamp",
                F.when(to_recalc["procurement_id"].isNotNull(), F.lit(now))
                 .otherwise(F.col("recalc_timestamp")))
            .drop(to_recalc["recalculated_cost"])
        )

        updated_orders.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("procurement_orders")

        audit = spark.createDataFrame(
            [(p_vendor_id, p_cost_model, v_count, None, now)],
            ["vendor_id", "cost_model", "records_updated", "error_msg", "run_at"]
        )
        audit.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("cost_recalc_audit")

    except Exception as e:
        audit = spark.createDataFrame(
            [(p_vendor_id, p_cost_model, 0, str(e), now)],
            ["vendor_id", "cost_model", "records_updated", "error_msg", "run_at"]
        )
        audit.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("cost_recalc_audit")
        raise

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def generate_patient_billing_statements(p_billing_cycle_id, clinical_encounters,
                                         procedure_rate_table, billing_statements,
                                         billing_statement_lines, billing_cycle_summary, spark):
    unbilled = clinical_encounters.filter(
        (F.col("billing_cycle_id") == p_billing_cycle_id) & (F.col("billed") == "N")
    )

    encounter_lines = (
        unbilled.alias("e")
        .join(procedure_rate_table.alias("pr"), "procedure_code", "inner")
        .withColumn("line_total", F.col("pr.unit_charge") * F.col("e.units_performed"))
        .select(
            "e.patient_id", "e.encounter_id", "e.encounter_date",
            "e.diagnosis_code", "e.procedure_code",
            F.col("pr.unit_charge"), "e.units_performed", "line_total"
        )
    )

    max_stmt_id = billing_statements.agg(F.max("statement_id")).collect()[0][0] or 0
    patient_ids = encounter_lines.select("patient_id").distinct()
    w = Window.orderBy("patient_id")
    patient_with_stmt = patient_ids.withColumn(
        "statement_id", F.row_number().over(w) + max_stmt_id
    )

    lines_with_stmt = encounter_lines.join(patient_with_stmt, "patient_id", "inner")

    stmt_totals = (
        lines_with_stmt.groupBy("patient_id", "statement_id")
        .agg(F.sum("line_total").alias("total_charges"))
    )

    new_statements = (
        stmt_totals
        .withColumn("billing_cycle_id", F.lit(p_billing_cycle_id))
        .withColumn("statement_date", F.lit(now))
        .withColumn("status", F.lit("issued"))
        .select("statement_id", "patient_id", "billing_cycle_id",
                "statement_date", "total_charges", "status")
    )
    new_statements.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("billing_statements")

    new_lines = (
        lines_with_stmt
        .select("statement_id", "encounter_id", "encounter_date", "diagnosis_code",
                "procedure_code", "unit_charge", "units_performed", "line_total")
    )
    new_lines.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("billing_statement_lines")

    encounter_ids_billed = lines_with_stmt.select("encounter_id", "statement_id").distinct()
    updated_encounters = (
        clinical_encounters
        .join(encounter_ids_billed, "encounter_id", "left")
        .withColumn("billed",
            F.when(encounter_ids_billed["encounter_id"].isNotNull(), "Y")
             .otherwise(F.col("billed")))
        .withColumn("statement_id",
            F.coalesce(encounter_ids_billed["statement_id"], clinical_encounters["statement_id"]))
        .withColumn("billed_at",
            F.when(encounter_ids_billed["encounter_id"].isNotNull(), F.lit(now))
             .otherwise(F.col("billed_at")))
        .drop(encounter_ids_billed["encounter_id"], encounter_ids_billed["statement_id"])
    )
    updated_encounters.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("clinical_encounters")

    v_stmt_count = new_statements.count()
    v_line_count = new_lines.count()
    summary = spark.createDataFrame(
        [(p_billing_cycle_id, v_stmt_count, v_line_count, now)],
        ["billing_cycle_id", "statements_issued", "total_lines", "processed_at"]
    )
    summary.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("billing_cycle_summary")

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def propagate_tariff_changes(p_tariff_code, p_effective_date,
                              tariff_schedules, product_catalog,
                              import_cost_components, tariff_impact_log,
                              tariff_error_log, spark):
    schedule = tariff_schedules.filter(
        (F.col("tariff_code") == p_tariff_code) &
        (F.col("effective_date") == p_effective_date)
    ).collect()

    if not schedule:
        err = spark.createDataFrame(
            [(p_tariff_code, "Tariff schedule not found", now)],
            ["tariff_code", "error_msg", "logged_at"]
        )
        err.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("tariff_error_log")
        return

    v_rate      = schedule[0]["current_rate"]
    v_prev_rate = schedule[0]["previous_rate"]
    v_category  = schedule[0]["product_category"]
    v_pct_change = round((v_rate - v_prev_rate) / v_prev_rate * 100, 4) if v_prev_rate else None

    affected_skus = product_catalog.filter(
        (F.col("product_category") == v_category) &
        (F.col("tariff_code") == p_tariff_code)
    ).select("sku").distinct()

    updated_costs = (
        import_cost_components
        .join(affected_skus, "sku", "left_semi")
        .filter(F.col("cost_source") == "import")
        .withColumn("duty_rate", F.lit(v_rate))
        .withColumn("landed_cost", F.col("unit_cost") * (1 + v_rate / 100))
        .withColumn("tariff_updated_at", F.lit(now))
    )

    unchanged = import_cost_components.join(affected_skus, "sku", "left_anti")
    v_affected = updated_costs.count()

    updated_costs.unionByName(unchanged).write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("import_cost_components")

    impact_logs = (
        affected_skus
        .withColumn("tariff_code", F.lit(p_tariff_code))
        .withColumn("old_rate", F.lit(v_prev_rate))
        .withColumn("new_rate", F.lit(v_rate))
        .withColumn("pct_change", F.lit(v_pct_change))
        .withColumn("applied_at", F.lit(now))
        .select("tariff_code", "sku", "old_rate", "new_rate", "pct_change", "applied_at")
    )
    impact_logs.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("tariff_impact_log")

    updated_schedules = tariff_schedules.withColumn(
        "propagation_status",
        F.when(
            (F.col("tariff_code") == p_tariff_code) & (F.col("effective_date") == p_effective_date),
            "done"
        ).otherwise(F.col("propagation_status"))
    ).withColumn(
        "skus_affected",
        F.when(
            (F.col("tariff_code") == p_tariff_code) & (F.col("effective_date") == p_effective_date),
            F.lit(v_affected)
        ).otherwise(F.col("skus_affected"))
    ).withColumn(
        "propagated_at",
        F.when(
            (F.col("tariff_code") == p_tariff_code) & (F.col("effective_date") == p_effective_date),
            F.lit(now)
        ).otherwise(F.col("propagated_at"))
    )
    updated_schedules.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("tariff_schedules")

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def run_fraud_detection_sweep(p_detection_date, fraud_detection_rules,
                               payment_transactions, fraud_cases,
                               fraud_sweep_log, spark, p_sensitivity="medium"):
    rule = fraud_detection_rules.filter(
        (F.col("sensitivity") == p_sensitivity) & (F.col("active_flag") == "Y")
    ).orderBy(F.col("created_at").desc()).limit(1).collect()

    if not rule:
        err = spark.createDataFrame(
            [(p_detection_date, p_sensitivity, None, 0, "No active rule found", now)],
            ["detection_date", "sensitivity", "rule_version", "cases_opened", "error_msg", "run_at"]
        )
        err.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("fraud_sweep_log")
        return

    v_velocity_limit = rule[0]["velocity_limit"]
    v_amount_limit   = rule[0]["amount_limit"]
    v_rule_version   = rule[0]["rule_version"]

    suspicious = (
        payment_transactions
        .filter((F.col("txn_date") == p_detection_date) & (F.col("flagged") == "N"))
        .groupBy("account_id")
        .agg(
            F.count("*").alias("txn_count"),
            F.sum("txn_amount").alias("total_amount"),
            F.max("txn_amount").alias("max_single")
        )
        .filter(
            (F.col("txn_count") > v_velocity_limit) |
            (F.col("max_single") > v_amount_limit)
        )
    )

    max_case_id = fraud_cases.agg(F.max("case_id")).collect()[0][0] or 0
    w = Window.orderBy("account_id")
    suspicious_with_case = suspicious.withColumn(
        "case_id", F.row_number().over(w) + max_case_id
    )

    new_cases = (
        suspicious_with_case
        .withColumn("detection_date", F.lit(p_detection_date))
        .withColumn("sensitivity", F.lit(p_sensitivity))
        .withColumn("rule_version", F.lit(v_rule_version))
        .withColumn("case_status", F.lit("open"))
        .withColumn("opened_at", F.lit(now))
        .select("case_id", "account_id", "detection_date", "txn_count",
                "total_amount", "max_single", "sensitivity", "rule_version",
                "case_status", "opened_at")
    )
    new_cases.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("fraud_cases")

    flagged_accounts = suspicious_with_case.select("account_id", "case_id")
    updated_txns = (
        payment_transactions
        .join(flagged_accounts, "account_id", "left")
        .withColumn("flagged",
            F.when(
                (flagged_accounts["account_id"].isNotNull()) &
                (F.col("txn_date") == p_detection_date), "Y"
            ).otherwise(F.col("flagged")))
        .withColumn("fraud_case_ref",
            F.when(
                (flagged_accounts["account_id"].isNotNull()) &
                (F.col("txn_date") == p_detection_date),
                F.col("case_id")
            ).otherwise(F.col("fraud_case_ref")))
        .drop(flagged_accounts["account_id"], flagged_accounts["case_id"])
    )
    updated_txns.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("payment_transactions")

    cases_opened = suspicious_with_case.count()
    sweep_log = spark.createDataFrame(
        [(p_detection_date, p_sensitivity, v_rule_version, cases_opened, None, now)],
        ["detection_date", "sensitivity", "rule_version", "cases_opened", "error_msg", "run_at"]
    )
    sweep_log.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("fraud_sweep_log")

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def age_warehouse_inventory(p_warehouse_id, p_as_of_date,
                             warehouse_inventory, inventory_aging_report,
                             aging_error_log, spark):
    try:
        to_age = warehouse_inventory.filter(
            (F.col("warehouse_id") == p_warehouse_id) &
            (F.col("inventory_status") != "aged")
        ).withColumn(
            "days_on_hand",
            F.datediff(F.lit(p_as_of_date), F.col("received_date"))
        ).withColumn(
            "aging_tier",
            F.when(F.datediff(F.lit(p_as_of_date), F.col("received_date")) > 365, "write_off")
             .when(F.datediff(F.lit(p_as_of_date), F.col("received_date")) > 180, "slow_moving")
             .when(F.datediff(F.lit(p_as_of_date), F.col("received_date")) > 90,  "aging")
             .otherwise("current")
        )

        updated_inv = (
            warehouse_inventory
            .join(
                to_age.select("sku", "warehouse_id", "days_on_hand", "aging_tier"),
                ["sku", "warehouse_id"], "left"
            )
            .withColumn("days_on_hand",
                F.coalesce(to_age["days_on_hand"], warehouse_inventory["days_on_hand"]))
            .withColumn("aging_tier",
                F.coalesce(to_age["aging_tier"], warehouse_inventory["aging_tier"]))
            .withColumn("inventory_status",
                F.when(to_age["aging_tier"] == "write_off", "aged")
                 .otherwise(F.col("inventory_status")))
            .withColumn("aged_at",
                F.when(to_age["aging_tier"] == "write_off", F.lit(now))
                 .otherwise(F.col("aged_at")))
            .withColumn("last_aged_calc",
                F.when(to_age["aging_tier"].isNotNull(), F.lit(now))
                 .otherwise(F.col("last_aged_calc")))
            .drop(to_age["days_on_hand"], to_age["aging_tier"])
        )
        updated_inv.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("warehouse_inventory")

        agg = to_age.agg(
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("aging_tier") == "write_off", F.col("quantity_on_hand")).otherwise(0)).alias("write_off_units"),
            F.sum(F.when(F.col("aging_tier").isin("slow_moving", "aging"), F.col("quantity_on_hand")).otherwise(0)).alias("provision_units"),
            F.count("sku").alias("total_skus")
        ).collect()[0]

        report = spark.createDataFrame(
            [(p_warehouse_id, p_as_of_date,
              agg["write_off_units"], agg["provision_units"],
              agg["total_skus"], now)],
            ["warehouse_id", "as_of_date", "write_off_units",
             "provision_units", "total_skus", "run_at"]
        )
        report.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("inventory_aging_report")

    except Exception as e:
        err = spark.createDataFrame(
            [(p_warehouse_id, str(e), now)],
            ["warehouse_id", "error_msg", "logged_at"]
        )
        err.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("aging_error_log")
        raise

from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from datetime import datetime

now = datetime.now()

def reconcile_broker_trade_confirmations(p_trade_date, p_broker_id,
                                          internal_trade_blotter,
                                          broker_trade_confirmations,
                                          recon_run_log, recon_breaks, spark):
    tolerance = 0.001
    max_run = recon_run_log.agg(F.max("run_id")).collect()[0][0] or 0
    v_run_id = max_run + 1

    run_row = spark.createDataFrame(
        [(v_run_id, p_trade_date, p_broker_id, now, "running", None, None, None)],
        ["run_id", "trade_date", "broker_id", "started_at", "status",
         "matched_count", "unmatched_count", "completed_at"]
    )
    run_row.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("recon_run_log")

    internal = internal_trade_blotter.filter(
        (F.col("trade_date") == p_trade_date) &
        (F.col("broker_id") == p_broker_id) &
        (F.col("recon_status") == "pending")
    )

    external = broker_trade_confirmations.filter(
        (F.col("trade_date") == p_trade_date) &
        (F.col("broker_id") == p_broker_id) &
        (F.col("recon_matched") == "N")
    ).select(
        "instrument_id", "direction",
        F.col("quantity").alias("ext_qty"),
        F.col("trade_price").alias("ext_price")
    )

    joined = internal.join(external, ["instrument_id", "direction"], "left")

    matched = joined.filter(
        (F.abs(F.col("ext_qty") - F.col("quantity")) <= tolerance) &
        (F.abs(F.col("ext_price") - F.col("trade_price")) <= tolerance)
    )

    qty_breaks = joined.filter(
        F.col("ext_qty").isNotNull() &
        ((F.abs(F.col("ext_qty") - F.col("quantity")) > tolerance) |
         (F.abs(F.col("ext_price") - F.col("trade_price")) > tolerance))
    ).withColumn(
        "break_type",
        F.when(F.abs(F.col("ext_qty") - F.col("quantity")) > tolerance, "qty_break")
         .otherwise("price_break")
    )

    missing = joined.filter(F.col("ext_qty").isNull()).withColumn("break_type", F.lit("missing_confirm"))

    all_breaks = (
        qty_breaks.select(
            F.lit(v_run_id).alias("run_id"), "trade_id", "instrument_id",
            F.col("quantity").alias("int_qty"), "ext_qty",
            F.col("trade_price").alias("int_price"), "ext_price",
            "break_type", F.lit(now).alias("detected_at")
        )
        .unionByName(
            missing.select(
                F.lit(v_run_id).alias("run_id"), "trade_id", "instrument_id",
                F.col("quantity").alias("int_qty"),
                F.lit(None).cast("double").alias("ext_qty"),
                F.col("trade_price").alias("int_price"),
                F.lit(None).cast("double").alias("ext_price"),
                "break_type", F.lit(now).alias("detected_at")
            )
        )
    )
    all_breaks.write.mode("append").saveAsTable("recon_breaks")

    v_matched   = matched.count()
    v_unmatched = all_breaks.count()

    matched_ids = matched.select("trade_id").distinct()
    updated_blotter = internal_trade_blotter.withColumn(
        "recon_status",
        F.when(F.col("trade_id").isin([r[0] for r in matched_ids.collect()]), "matched")
         .otherwise(F.col("recon_status"))
    )
    updated_blotter.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("internal_trade_blotter")

    updated_run = recon_run_log.withColumn(
        "matched_count", F.when(F.col("run_id") == v_run_id, F.lit(v_matched)).otherwise(F.col("matched_count"))
    ).withColumn(
        "unmatched_count", F.when(F.col("run_id") == v_run_id, F.lit(v_unmatched)).otherwise(F.col("unmatched_count"))
    ).withColumn(
        "status", F.when(F.col("run_id") == v_run_id, "completed").otherwise(F.col("status"))
    ).withColumn(
        "completed_at", F.when(F.col("run_id") == v_run_id, F.lit(now)).otherwise(F.col("completed_at"))
    )
    updated_run.write.mode("overwrite").saveAsTable("recon_run_log")

AS

    WHERE OriginAirport = @OriginCode

CREATE PROCEDURE GetCourseEnrollmentSummary
    @CourseCatalogYear INT
AS
BEGIN
    SELECT CourseCode, CourseName, Department, CreditHours,
           COUNT(EnrollmentID) AS TotalEnrollments,
           MAX(EnrollmentCapacity) AS Capacity
    FROM CourseEnrollments
    WHERE CatalogYear = @CourseCatalogYear
    GROUP BY CourseCode, CourseName, Department, CreditHours
    ORDER BY TotalEnrollments DESC;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE GetTopRatedHotels
    @MinStarRating INT,
    @TopN INT
AS
BEGIN
    SELECT TOP (@TopN)
        HotelID, HotelName, ChainBrand, City, Country,
        StarRating, AverageGuestScore, TotalReviews, PricePerNight
    FROM HotelDirectory
    WHERE StarRating >= @MinStarRating
      AND IsOperational = 1
    ORDER BY AverageGuestScore DESC, TotalReviews DESC;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE ReconcileInsuranceClaims
    @BatchDate DATE,
    @ProcessorID INT,
    @ClaimsProcessed INT OUTPUT,
    @TotalApproved DECIMAL(18,2) OUTPUT,
    @ErrorCount INT OUTPUT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        CREATE TABLE #StagedClaims (
            ClaimID BIGINT,
            PolicyNumber NVARCHAR(50),
            ClaimantID INT,
            ClaimAmount DECIMAL(18,2),
            DiagnosisCode NVARCHAR(20),
            ProviderNPI NVARCHAR(20),
            SubmittedDate DATE,
            EligibilityStatus NVARCHAR(20),
            CoveragePercent DECIMAL(5,2),
            ApprovedAmount DECIMAL(18,2),
            RejectionReason NVARCHAR(500),
            ProcessingFlag NVARCHAR(20)
        );

        INSERT INTO #StagedClaims
        SELECT
            c.ClaimID,
            c.PolicyNumber,
            c.ClaimantID,
            c.ClaimAmount,
            c.DiagnosisCode,
            c.ProviderNPI,
            c.SubmittedDate,
            e.EligibilityStatus,
            COALESCE(pb.CoveragePercent, 0) AS CoveragePercent,
            CASE
                WHEN e.EligibilityStatus != 'ACTIVE' THEN 0
                WHEN c.ClaimAmount > pb.MaxClaimLimit THEN pb.MaxClaimLimit
                ELSE ROUND(c.ClaimAmount * (pb.CoveragePercent / 100.0), 2)
            END AS ApprovedAmount,
            CASE
                WHEN e.EligibilityStatus != 'ACTIVE' THEN 'Policy not active at time of service'
                WHEN pb.PlanID IS NULL THEN 'No matching benefit plan found'
                ELSE NULL
            END AS RejectionReason,
            CASE
                WHEN e.EligibilityStatus != 'ACTIVE' THEN 'REJECTED'
                WHEN pb.PlanID IS NULL THEN 'REJECTED'
                ELSE 'APPROVED'
            END AS ProcessingFlag
        FROM InsuranceClaims c
        INNER JOIN PolicyEligibility e
            ON c.PolicyNumber = e.PolicyNumber
            AND c.SubmittedDate BETWEEN e.EffectiveDate AND COALESCE(e.TerminationDate, '9999-12-31')
        LEFT JOIN PlanBenefits pb
            ON e.PlanID = pb.PlanID
            AND c.DiagnosisCode BETWEEN pb.DiagnosisRangeStart AND pb.DiagnosisRangeEnd
        WHERE c.BatchDate = @BatchDate
          AND c.ProcessingStatus = 'PENDING'
          AND c.AssignedProcessorID = @ProcessorID;

        MERGE InsuranceClaimsProcessed AS target
        USING #StagedClaims AS source
        ON target.ClaimID = source.ClaimID
        WHEN MATCHED AND target.ProcessingStatus = 'PENDING' THEN
            UPDATE SET
                target.ApprovedAmount = source.ApprovedAmount,
                target.ProcessingFlag = source.ProcessingFlag,
                target.RejectionReason = source.RejectionReason,
                target.ProcessedDate = GETDATE(),
                target.ProcessorID = @ProcessorID,
                target.ProcessingStatus = 'COMPLETE'
        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT (ClaimID, PolicyNumber, ClaimantID, ClaimAmount, ApprovedAmount,
                    ProcessingFlag, RejectionReason, ProcessedDate, ProcessorID, ProcessingStatus)
            VALUES (source.ClaimID, source.PolicyNumber, source.ClaimantID, source.ClaimAmount,
                    source.ApprovedAmount, source.ProcessingFlag, source.RejectionReason,
                    GETDATE(), @ProcessorID, 'COMPLETE');

        SELECT
            @ClaimsProcessed = COUNT(*),
            @TotalApproved = SUM(CASE WHEN ProcessingFlag = 'APPROVED' THEN ApprovedAmount ELSE 0 END),
            @ErrorCount = SUM(CASE WHEN ProcessingFlag = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        FROM #StagedClaims;

        UPDATE InsuranceClaims
        SET ProcessingStatus = 'PROCESSED', ProcessedAt = GETDATE()
        WHERE ClaimID IN (SELECT ClaimID FROM #StagedClaims);

        DROP TABLE #StagedClaims;
        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#StagedClaims') IS NOT NULL
            DROP TABLE #StagedClaims;
        ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        INSERT INTO ClaimProcessingErrors (BatchDate, ProcessorID, ErrorMessage, ErrorLine, OccurredAt)
        VALUES (@BatchDate, @ProcessorID, ERROR_MESSAGE(), ERROR_LINE(), GETDATE());
        SET @ErrorCount = -1;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END
pyspark_code:
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import (
    col, when, coalesce, lit, round as spark_round,
    sum as spark_sum, count, current_timestamp
)
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
import traceback

spark = SparkSession.builder \
    .appName('ReconcileInsuranceClaims') \
    .config('spark.sql.sources.partitionOverwriteMode', 'dynamic') \
    .getOrCreate()

def reconcile_insurance_claims(batch_date: str, processor_id: int):
    result = {'ClaimsProcessed': 0, 'TotalApproved': 0.0, 'ErrorCount': 0}
    try:
        claims_df = spark.table('InsuranceClaims').filter(
            (col('BatchDate') == batch_date) &
            (col('ProcessingStatus') == 'PENDING') &
            (col('AssignedProcessorID') == processor_id)
        )

        eligibility_df = spark.table('PolicyEligibility')
        benefits_df = spark.table('PlanBenefits')

        # Range join: submitted date within effective/termination window
        elig_joined = claims_df.alias('c').join(
            eligibility_df.alias('e'),
            (col('c.PolicyNumber') == col('e.PolicyNumber')) &
            (col('c.SubmittedDate') >= col('e.EffectiveDate')) &
            (col('c.SubmittedDate') <= coalesce(col('e.TerminationDate'), lit('9999-12-31'))),
            'inner'
        )

        # Diagnosis code range join to plan benefits
        staged_df = elig_joined.join(
            benefits_df.alias('pb'),
            (col('e.PlanID') == col('pb.PlanID')) &
            (col('c.DiagnosisCode') >= col('pb.DiagnosisRangeStart')) &
            (col('c.DiagnosisCode') <= col('pb.DiagnosisRangeEnd')),
            'left'
        ).withColumn(
            'ApprovedAmount',
            when(col('e.EligibilityStatus') != 'ACTIVE', lit(0))
            .when(col('c.ClaimAmount') > col('pb.MaxClaimLimit'), col('pb.MaxClaimLimit'))
            .otherwise(spark_round(col('c.ClaimAmount') * (col('pb.CoveragePercent') / 100.0), 2))
        ).withColumn(
            'RejectionReason',
            when(col('e.EligibilityStatus') != 'ACTIVE', lit('Policy not active at time of service'))
            .when(col('pb.PlanID').isNull(), lit('No matching benefit plan found'))
            .otherwise(lit(None))
        ).withColumn(
            'ProcessingFlag',
            when(
                (col('e.EligibilityStatus') != 'ACTIVE') | col('pb.PlanID').isNull(), 'REJECTED'
            ).otherwise('APPROVED')
        ).withColumn('ProcessedDate', current_timestamp()) \
         .withColumn('ProcessorID', lit(processor_id)) \
         .withColumn('ProcessingStatus', lit('COMPLETE')) \
         .select(
             col('c.ClaimID'), col('c.PolicyNumber'), col('c.ClaimantID'),
             col('c.ClaimAmount'), 'ApprovedAmount', 'ProcessingFlag',
             'RejectionReason', 'ProcessedDate', 'ProcessorID', 'ProcessingStatus'
         ).cache()

        # MERGE equivalent using Delta
        delta_target = DeltaTable.forName(spark, 'InsuranceClaimsProcessed')
        delta_target.alias('target').merge(
            staged_df.alias('source'), 'target.ClaimID = source.ClaimID'
        ).whenMatchedUpdate(
            condition="target.ProcessingStatus = 'PENDING'",
            set={
                'ApprovedAmount': col('source.ApprovedAmount'),
                'ProcessingFlag': col('source.ProcessingFlag'),
                'RejectionReason': col('source.RejectionReason'),
                'ProcessedDate': col('source.ProcessedDate'),
                'ProcessorID': col('source.ProcessorID'),
                'ProcessingStatus': lit('COMPLETE')
            }
        ).whenNotMatchedInsertAll().execute()

        # Compute output parameter equivalents
        summary = staged_df.agg(
            count('ClaimID').alias('ClaimsProcessed'),
            spark_sum(when(col('ProcessingFlag') == 'APPROVED', col('ApprovedAmount')).otherwise(0)).alias('TotalApproved'),
            spark_sum(when(col('ProcessingFlag') == 'REJECTED', 1).otherwise(0)).alias('ErrorCount')
        ).collect()[0]

        result = {
            'ClaimsProcessed': summary['ClaimsProcessed'],
            'TotalApproved': float(summary['TotalApproved']),
            'ErrorCount': summary['ErrorCount']
        }

        # Mark source claims as processed
        processed_ids = staged_df.select('ClaimID')
        delta_claims = DeltaTable.forName(spark, 'InsuranceClaims')
        delta_claims.alias('t').merge(
            processed_ids.alias('s'), 't.ClaimID = s.ClaimID'
        ).whenMatchedUpdate(set={
            'ProcessingStatus': lit('PROCESSED'),
            'ProcessedAt': current_timestamp()
        }).execute()

        staged_df.unpersist()
        return result

    except Exception as e:
        error_df = spark.createDataFrame([(
            batch_date, processor_id, str(e), -1
        )], ['BatchDate', 'ProcessorID', 'ErrorMessage', 'ErrorLine']) \
            .withColumn('OccurredAt', current_timestamp())
        error_df.write.mode('append').saveAsTable('ClaimProcessingErrors')
        result['ErrorCount'] = -1
        raise

output = reconcile_insurance_claims('2024-03-15', 42)
print(output)

CREATE PROCEDURE RebalanceInvestmentPortfolios
    @RebalanceDate DATE,
    @TolerancePct DECIMAL(5,2) = 5.0,
    @PortfoliosRebalanced INT OUTPUT,
    @TotalTradeValue DECIMAL(18,2) OUTPUT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        CREATE TABLE #PortfolioPositions (
            PortfolioID INT,
            ClientID INT,
            AssetClass NVARCHAR(50),
            TickerSymbol NVARCHAR(20),
            CurrentShares DECIMAL(18,4),
            CurrentPrice DECIMAL(18,4),
            MarketValue DECIMAL(18,2),
            PortfolioTotalValue DECIMAL(18,2),
            CurrentWeightPct DECIMAL(8,4),
            TargetWeightPct DECIMAL(8,4),
            WeightDriftPct DECIMAL(8,4),
            TargetMarketValue DECIMAL(18,2),
            TradeValue DECIMAL(18,2),
            TradeDirection NVARCHAR(10)
        );

        INSERT INTO #PortfolioPositions
        SELECT
            h.PortfolioID,
            h.ClientID,
            h.AssetClass,
            h.TickerSymbol,
            h.CurrentShares,
            mp.LastPrice AS CurrentPrice,
            h.CurrentShares * mp.LastPrice AS MarketValue,
            SUM(h.CurrentShares * mp.LastPrice) OVER (PARTITION BY h.PortfolioID) AS PortfolioTotalValue,
            (h.CurrentShares * mp.LastPrice) /
                NULLIF(SUM(h.CurrentShares * mp.LastPrice) OVER (PARTITION BY h.PortfolioID), 0) * 100
                AS CurrentWeightPct,
            ta.TargetWeightPct,
            ABS((h.CurrentShares * mp.LastPrice) /
                NULLIF(SUM(h.CurrentShares * mp.LastPrice) OVER (PARTITION BY h.PortfolioID), 0) * 100
                - ta.TargetWeightPct) AS WeightDriftPct,
            SUM(h.CurrentShares * mp.LastPrice) OVER (PARTITION BY h.PortfolioID)
                * ta.TargetWeightPct / 100 AS TargetMarketValue,
            ABS((SUM(h.CurrentShares * mp.LastPrice) OVER (PARTITION BY h.PortfolioID)
                * ta.TargetWeightPct / 100) - (h.CurrentShares * mp.LastPrice)) AS TradeValue,
            CASE
                WHEN (SUM(h.CurrentShares * mp.LastPrice) OVER (PARTITION BY h.PortfolioID)
                    * ta.TargetWeightPct / 100) > (h.CurrentShares * mp.LastPrice) THEN 'BUY'
                ELSE 'SELL'
            END AS TradeDirection
        FROM PortfolioHoldings h
        INNER JOIN MarketPrices mp ON h.TickerSymbol = mp.TickerSymbol
            AND mp.PriceDate = @RebalanceDate
        INNER JOIN TargetAllocations ta ON h.PortfolioID = ta.PortfolioID
            AND h.AssetClass = ta.AssetClass;

        WITH NeedingRebalance AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT PortfolioID
            FROM #PortfolioPositions
            WHERE WeightDriftPct > @TolerancePct
        )
        INSERT INTO RebalancingOrders
            (PortfolioID, ClientID, TickerSymbol, TradeDirection, TradeValue,
             TargetShares, CurrentShares, RebalanceDate, OrderStatus, CreatedAt)
        SELECT
            p.PortfolioID, p.ClientID, p.TickerSymbol, p.TradeDirection,
            p.TradeValue,
            ROUND(p.TargetMarketValue / NULLIF(p.CurrentPrice, 0), 4) AS TargetShares,
            p.CurrentShares,
            @RebalanceDate,
            'PENDING',
            GETDATE()
        FROM #PortfolioPositions p
        INNER JOIN NeedingRebalance nr ON p.PortfolioID = nr.PortfolioID
        WHERE p.TradeValue > 100;

        SELECT
            @PortfoliosRebalanced = COUNT(DISTINCT PortfolioID),
            @TotalTradeValue = SUM(TradeValue)
        FROM RebalancingOrders
        WHERE RebalanceDate = @RebalanceDate AND OrderStatus = 'PENDING';

        DROP TABLE #PortfolioPositions;
        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PortfolioPositions') IS NOT NULL
            DROP TABLE #PortfolioPositions;
        ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import (
    col, abs as spark_abs, sum as spark_sum, count, countDistinct,
    when, lit, round as spark_round, current_timestamp, nullif
)
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName('RebalanceInvestmentPortfolios').getOrCreate()

def rebalance_investment_portfolios(rebalance_date: str, tolerance_pct: float = 5.0):
    result = {'PortfoliosRebalanced': 0, 'TotalTradeValue': 0.0}
    try:
        holdings_df = spark.table('PortfolioHoldings')
        prices_df = spark.table('MarketPrices').filter(col('PriceDate') == rebalance_date)
        targets_df = spark.table('TargetAllocations')

        portfolio_window = Window.partitionBy('PortfolioID')

        positions_df = holdings_df.alias('h') \
            .join(prices_df.alias('mp'), col('h.TickerSymbol') == col('mp.TickerSymbol'), 'inner') \
            .join(targets_df.alias('ta'),
                  (col('h.PortfolioID') == col('ta.PortfolioID')) &
                  (col('h.AssetClass') == col('ta.AssetClass')), 'inner') \
            .withColumn('MarketValue', col('h.CurrentShares') * col('mp.LastPrice')) \
            .withColumn('PortfolioTotalValue', spark_sum(col('h.CurrentShares') * col('mp.LastPrice')).over(portfolio_window)) \
            .withColumn(
                'CurrentWeightPct',
                when(col('PortfolioTotalValue') != 0,
                     col('MarketValue') / col('PortfolioTotalValue') * 100
                ).otherwise(lit(0))
            ) \
            .withColumn('WeightDriftPct', spark_abs(col('CurrentWeightPct') - col('ta.TargetWeightPct'))) \
            .withColumn('TargetMarketValue', col('PortfolioTotalValue') * col('ta.TargetWeightPct') / 100) \
            .withColumn('TradeValue', spark_abs(col('TargetMarketValue') - col('MarketValue'))) \
            .withColumn(
                'TradeDirection',
                when(col('TargetMarketValue') > col('MarketValue'), 'BUY').otherwise('SELL')
            ).cache()

        # Portfolios needing rebalance (CTE equivalent)
        needing_rebalance = positions_df.filter(col('WeightDriftPct') > tolerance_pct) \
            .select('PortfolioID').distinct()

        orders_df = positions_df.alias('p') \
            .join(needing_rebalance.alias('nr'), col('p.PortfolioID') == col('nr.PortfolioID'), 'inner') \
            .filter(col('p.TradeValue') > 100) \
            .withColumn(
                'TargetShares',
                when(col('p.CurrentPrice') != 0,
                     spark_round(col('TargetMarketValue') / col('p.CurrentPrice'), 4)
                ).otherwise(lit(0))
            ) \
            .select(
                col('p.PortfolioID'), col('p.ClientID'), col('p.TickerSymbol'),
                col('p.TradeDirection'), col('p.TradeValue'), col('TargetShares'),
                col('p.CurrentShares'),
                lit(rebalance_date).alias('RebalanceDate'),
                lit('PENDING').alias('OrderStatus'),
                current_timestamp().alias('CreatedAt')
            )

        orders_df.write.mode('append').saveAsTable('RebalancingOrders')

        summary = orders_df.agg(
            countDistinct('PortfolioID').alias('PortfoliosRebalanced'),
            spark_sum('TradeValue').alias('TotalTradeValue')
        ).collect()[0]

        positions_df.unpersist()
        result = {
            'PortfoliosRebalanced': summary['PortfoliosRebalanced'],
            'TotalTradeValue': float(summary['TotalTradeValue'] or 0)
        }
        return result

    except Exception as e:
        raise RuntimeError(f'Portfolio rebalancing failed: {e}') from e

print(rebalance_investment_portfolios('2024-06-30', tolerance_pct=5.0))

CREATE PROCEDURE ProcessTelematicsAlerts
    @ProcessingWindowMinutes INT = 60,
    @AlertsGenerated INT OUTPUT,
    @CriticalAlerts INT OUTPUT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        CREATE TABLE #RawEvents (
            EventID BIGINT,
            VehicleID NVARCHAR(50),
            FleetID INT,
            DriverID INT,
            EventTimestamp DATETIME2,
            Latitude DECIMAL(10,6),
            Longitude DECIMAL(10,6),
            SpeedKph DECIMAL(8,2),
            AccelerationG DECIMAL(6,3),
            BrakeForceG DECIMAL(6,3),
            EngineRPM INT,
            FuelLevelPct DECIMAL(5,2),
            PrevTimestamp DATETIME2,
            PrevSpeedKph DECIMAL(8,2),
            SpeedDeltaKph DECIMAL(8,2),
            TimeDeltaSeconds INT,
            RollingAvgSpeed DECIMAL(8,2),
            EventSeverity NVARCHAR(20)
        );

        INSERT INTO #RawEvents
        SELECT
            t.EventID, t.VehicleID, t.FleetID, t.DriverID, t.EventTimestamp,
            t.Latitude, t.Longitude, t.SpeedKph, t.AccelerationG,
            t.BrakeForceG, t.EngineRPM, t.FuelLevelPct,
            LAG(t.EventTimestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY t.VehicleID ORDER BY t.EventTimestamp) AS PrevTimestamp,
            LAG(t.SpeedKph) OVER (PARTITION BY t.VehicleID ORDER BY t.EventTimestamp) AS PrevSpeedKph,
            t.SpeedKph - LAG(t.SpeedKph) OVER (PARTITION BY t.VehicleID ORDER BY t.EventTimestamp) AS SpeedDeltaKph,
            DATEDIFF(SECOND,
                LAG(t.EventTimestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY t.VehicleID ORDER BY t.EventTimestamp),
                t.EventTimestamp) AS TimeDeltaSeconds,
            AVG(t.SpeedKph) OVER (
                PARTITION BY t.VehicleID
                ORDER BY t.EventTimestamp
                ROWS BETWEEN 5 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
            ) AS RollingAvgSpeed,
            CASE
                WHEN t.AccelerationG > 0.5 OR t.BrakeForceG > 0.6 THEN 'CRITICAL'
                WHEN t.SpeedKph > 130 OR t.AccelerationG > 0.3 THEN 'HIGH'
                WHEN t.FuelLevelPct < 10 THEN 'MEDIUM'
                ELSE 'LOW'
            END AS EventSeverity
        FROM VehicleTelematicsEvents t
        WHERE t.EventTimestamp >= DATEADD(MINUTE, -@ProcessingWindowMinutes, GETDATE())
          AND t.ProcessingStatus = 'UNPROCESSED';

        WITH AlertEligible AS (
            SELECT *,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                       PARTITION BY VehicleID, CAST(EventTimestamp AS DATE),
                                    DATEPART(HOUR, EventTimestamp)
                       ORDER BY EventTimestamp
                   ) AS HourlyEventRank
            FROM #RawEvents
            WHERE EventSeverity IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
               OR (EventSeverity = 'MEDIUM' AND FuelLevelPct < 10)
        )
        INSERT INTO TelematicsAlerts
            (VehicleID, FleetID, DriverID, AlertType, Severity, EventTimestamp,
             SpeedKph, AccelerationG, BrakeForceG, SpeedDelta, RollingAvgSpeed,
             GeoLocation, AlertStatus, CreatedAt)
        SELECT
            ae.VehicleID, ae.FleetID, ae.DriverID,
            CASE
                WHEN ae.AccelerationG > 0.5 THEN 'HARSH_ACCELERATION'
                WHEN ae.BrakeForceG > 0.6 THEN 'HARSH_BRAKING'
                WHEN ae.SpeedKph > 130 THEN 'SPEEDING'
                WHEN ae.FuelLevelPct < 10 THEN 'LOW_FUEL'
                ELSE 'DRIVING_EVENT'
            END AS AlertType,
            ae.EventSeverity,
            ae.EventTimestamp,
            ae.SpeedKph, ae.AccelerationG, ae.BrakeForceG, ae.SpeedDeltaKph,
            ae.RollingAvgSpeed,
            GEOGRAPHY::Point(ae.Latitude, ae.Longitude, 4326) AS GeoLocation,
            'OPEN' AS AlertStatus,
            GETDATE()
        FROM AlertEligible ae
        WHERE ae.HourlyEventRank <= 3;

        UPDATE VehicleTelematicsEvents
        SET ProcessingStatus = 'PROCESSED', ProcessedAt = GETDATE()
        WHERE EventID IN (SELECT EventID FROM #RawEvents);

        SELECT
            @AlertsGenerated = COUNT(*),
            @CriticalAlerts = SUM(CASE WHEN Severity = 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        FROM TelematicsAlerts
        WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(MINUTE, -1, GETDATE());

        DROP TABLE #RawEvents;
        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#RawEvents') IS NOT NULL
            DROP TABLE #RawEvents;
        ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import (
    col, lag, avg, when, lit, row_number, count,
    sum as spark_sum, current_timestamp, expr,
    datediff, unix_timestamp, concat
)
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName('ProcessTelematicsAlerts').getOrCreate()

def process_telematics_alerts(processing_window_minutes: int = 60):
    result = {'AlertsGenerated': 0, 'CriticalAlerts': 0}
    try:
        cutoff_ts = (datetime.utcnow() - timedelta(minutes=processing_window_minutes)).strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')

        raw_df = spark.table('VehicleTelematicsEvents').filter(
            (col('EventTimestamp') >= cutoff_ts) &
            (col('ProcessingStatus') == 'UNPROCESSED')
        )

        vehicle_window = Window.partitionBy('VehicleID').orderBy('EventTimestamp')
        rolling_window = vehicle_window.rowsBetween(-5, 0)

        enriched_df = raw_df \
            .withColumn('PrevTimestamp', lag('EventTimestamp', 1).over(vehicle_window)) \
            .withColumn('PrevSpeedKph', lag('SpeedKph', 1).over(vehicle_window)) \
            .withColumn('SpeedDeltaKph', col('SpeedKph') - lag('SpeedKph', 1).over(vehicle_window)) \
            .withColumn('TimeDeltaSeconds',
                unix_timestamp(col('EventTimestamp')) - unix_timestamp(lag('EventTimestamp', 1).over(vehicle_window))
            ) \
            .withColumn('RollingAvgSpeed', avg('SpeedKph').over(rolling_window)) \
            .withColumn(
                'EventSeverity',
                when((col('AccelerationG') > 0.5) | (col('BrakeForceG') > 0.6), 'CRITICAL')
                .when((col('SpeedKph') > 130) | (col('AccelerationG') > 0.3), 'HIGH')
                .when(col('FuelLevelPct') < 10, 'MEDIUM')
                .otherwise('LOW')
            ).cache()

        # CTE + ROW_NUMBER for per-hour deduplication
        hourly_window = Window.partitionBy(
            'VehicleID',
            expr('DATE(EventTimestamp)'),
            expr('HOUR(EventTimestamp)')
        ).orderBy('EventTimestamp')

        alert_eligible = enriched_df.filter(
            col('EventSeverity').isin(['CRITICAL', 'HIGH']) |
            ((col('EventSeverity') == 'MEDIUM') & (col('FuelLevelPct') < 10))
        ).withColumn('HourlyEventRank', row_number().over(hourly_window))

        alerts_df = alert_eligible.filter(col('HourlyEventRank') <= 3) \
            .withColumn(
                'AlertType',
                when(col('AccelerationG') > 0.5, 'HARSH_ACCELERATION')
                .when(col('BrakeForceG') > 0.6, 'HARSH_BRAKING')
                .when(col('SpeedKph') > 130, 'SPEEDING')
                .when(col('FuelLevelPct') < 10, 'LOW_FUEL')
                .otherwise('DRIVING_EVENT')
            ) \
            .withColumn('GeoLocation',
                concat(lit('POINT('), col('Longitude'), lit(' '), col('Latitude'), lit(')'))  # WKT
            ) \
            .withColumn('AlertStatus', lit('OPEN')) \
            .withColumn('CreatedAt', current_timestamp()) \
            .select(
                'VehicleID', 'FleetID', 'DriverID', 'AlertType',
                col('EventSeverity').alias('Severity'), 'EventTimestamp',
                'SpeedKph', 'AccelerationG', 'BrakeForceG', 'SpeedDeltaKph',
                'RollingAvgSpeed', 'GeoLocation', 'AlertStatus', 'CreatedAt'
            )

        alerts_df.write.mode('append').saveAsTable('TelematicsAlerts')

        summary = alerts_df.agg(
            count('*').alias('AlertsGenerated'),
            spark_sum(when(col('Severity') == 'CRITICAL', 1).otherwise(0)).alias('CriticalAlerts')
        ).collect()[0]

        # Mark source events processed
        processed_ids = enriched_df.select('EventID')
        delta_events = DeltaTable.forName(spark, 'VehicleTelematicsEvents')
        delta_events.alias('t').merge(processed_ids.alias('s'), 't.EventID = s.EventID') \
            .whenMatchedUpdate(set={
                'ProcessingStatus': lit('PROCESSED'),
                'ProcessedAt': current_timestamp()
            }).execute()

        enriched_df.unpersist()
        result = {
            'AlertsGenerated': summary['AlertsGenerated'],
            'CriticalAlerts': summary['CriticalAlerts']
        }
        return result

    except Exception as e:
        raise RuntimeError(f'Telematics alert processing failed: {e}') from e

print(process_telematics_alerts(processing_window_minutes=60))

CREATE PROCEDURE SynchronizeLoyaltyPointsLedger
    @ProgramID INT,
    @SyncFromDate DATE,
    @AccountsSynced INT OUTPUT,
    @PointsIssued BIGINT OUTPUT,
    @PointsRedeemed BIGINT OUTPUT,
    @DiscrepancyCount INT OUTPUT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        CREATE TABLE #LedgerSnapshot (
            MemberID INT,
            TierLevel NVARCHAR(20),
            ComputedBalance BIGINT,
            LastTransactionDate DATE,
            TotalEarned BIGINT,
            TotalRedeemed BIGINT,
            TotalExpired BIGINT,
            TotalAdjusted BIGINT,
            RecordedBalance BIGINT,
            BalanceDiscrepancy BIGINT,
            NeedsCorrection BIT
        );

        INSERT INTO #LedgerSnapshot
        SELECT
            lt.MemberID,
            lm.TierLevel,
            SUM(CASE
                WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'EARN' THEN lt.PointsAmount
                WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'REDEEM' THEN -lt.PointsAmount
                WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'EXPIRE' THEN -lt.PointsAmount
                WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'ADJUST' THEN lt.PointsAmount
                ELSE 0
            END) AS ComputedBalance,
            MAX(lt.TransactionDate) AS LastTransactionDate,
            SUM(CASE WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'EARN' THEN lt.PointsAmount ELSE 0 END) AS TotalEarned,
            SUM(CASE WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'REDEEM' THEN lt.PointsAmount ELSE 0 END) AS TotalRedeemed,
            SUM(CASE WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'EXPIRE' THEN lt.PointsAmount ELSE 0 END) AS TotalExpired,
            SUM(CASE WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'ADJUST' THEN lt.PointsAmount ELSE 0 END) AS TotalAdjusted,
            lm.CurrentPointBalance AS RecordedBalance,
            SUM(CASE
                WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'EARN' THEN lt.PointsAmount
                WHEN lt.TransactionType IN ('REDEEM', 'EXPIRE') THEN -lt.PointsAmount
                WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'ADJUST' THEN lt.PointsAmount
                ELSE 0
            END) - lm.CurrentPointBalance AS BalanceDiscrepancy,
            CASE WHEN ABS(SUM(CASE
                WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'EARN' THEN lt.PointsAmount
                WHEN lt.TransactionType IN ('REDEEM', 'EXPIRE') THEN -lt.PointsAmount
                WHEN lt.TransactionType = 'ADJUST' THEN lt.PointsAmount
                ELSE 0
            END) - lm.CurrentPointBalance) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS NeedsCorrection
        FROM LoyaltyTransactions lt
        INNER JOIN LoyaltyMembers lm ON lt.MemberID = lm.MemberID
        WHERE lt.ProgramID = @ProgramID
          AND lt.TransactionDate >= @SyncFromDate
          AND lt.IsVoided = 0
        GROUP BY lt.MemberID, lm.TierLevel, lm.CurrentPointBalance;

        MERGE LoyaltyMembers AS target
        USING #LedgerSnapshot AS source
        ON target.MemberID = source.MemberID
        WHEN MATCHED AND source.NeedsCorrection = 1 THEN
            UPDATE SET
                target.CurrentPointBalance = source.ComputedBalance,
                target.LastSyncDate = GETDATE(),
                target.TotalLifetimeEarned = source.TotalEarned,
                target.TotalLifetimeRedeemed = source.TotalRedeemed
        WHEN MATCHED AND source.NeedsCorrection = 0 THEN
            UPDATE SET target.LastSyncDate = GETDATE();

        INSERT INTO LoyaltyAuditLog
            (ProgramID, MemberID, AuditType, OldBalance, NewBalance,
             Discrepancy, TierLevel, AuditDate)
        SELECT
            @ProgramID, MemberID, 'SYNC_CORRECTION',
            RecordedBalance, ComputedBalance, BalanceDiscrepancy,
            TierLevel, GETDATE()
        FROM #LedgerSnapshot
        WHERE NeedsCorrection = 1;

        SELECT
            @AccountsSynced = COUNT(*),
            @PointsIssued = SUM(TotalEarned),
            @PointsRedeemed = SUM(TotalRedeemed),
            @DiscrepancyCount = SUM(CAST(NeedsCorrection AS INT))
        FROM #LedgerSnapshot;

        DROP TABLE #LedgerSnapshot;
        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#LedgerSnapshot') IS NOT NULL
            DROP TABLE #LedgerSnapshot;
        ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END
